rationale: Educ. Code §12.024 governs judicial notice of recorded school district charters and amendments. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A recorded charter or charter amendment is a public act. A court shall take judicial notice of a recorded charter or charter amendment and proof is not required of its provisions.
_note: No conflict; rule text concerns charter recording, not homestead exemptions.
